description: Keyed reconciliation by stable key (LIS move-minimized). Reconciling prior [a,b,c,d] -> target [b,c,a] emits only {remove d, move a}: b and c are already in relative order (the longest-increasing-subsequence over their prior indices [1,2]) so they MUST NOT move, and as stable entries with unchanged values their value cells MUST NOT be invalidated by the sibling reorder. Applying the minimal op set per-cell is the enabling step for per-cell CRDT merge of a document tree.
